channel.title: GitHub Markdown Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Markdown in GitHub

item.title: ethereum/ethereum-org-website
item.description: Ethereum.org is a primary online resource for the Ethereum community.

item.description: Linux命令大全搜索工具，内容包含Linux命令手册、详解、学习、搜集。https://git.io/linux

item.title: labuladong/fucking-algorithm
item.description: 刷算法全靠套路，认准 labuladong 就够了！English version supported! Crack LeetCode, not only how, but also why.

item.title: apple/swift-evolution
item.description: This maintains proposals for changes and user-visible enhancements to the Swift Programming Language.

item.description: SatoshiLabs Improvement Proposals

item.description: Open source documentation of Microsoft Azure

item.title: JoseDeFreitas/awesome-youtubers
item.description: An awesome list of awesome YouTubers that teach about technology. Tutorials about web development, computer science, machine learning, game development, cybersecurity, and more.

item.description: The content behind MDN Web Docs

item.description: The source repository of all translated content for MDN Web Docs

item.description: A curation of awesome portfolio website ideas for developers and designers to draw inspiration from. Raise a pull request to add more. 💜

item.description: This repository provides SAP style guides for coding and coding-related topics.
